_meta.description: Deprecation manifest for HeadyMe/Heady-pre-production. Lists every file scheduled for removal after consolidation to its canonical replacement. All deprecated files must be migrated before the deadline.
_meta.note: Deadline is 13 days from generation date (fib(7) = 13)

migrationSteps: Audit all require() / import paths referencing conductor.js across the codebase
Update each callsite to reference heady-conductor-v2.js
Verify API surface compatibility — confirm constructor signatures and exported methods match
Run unit tests for the conductor module
Run integration tests for any orchestration flow that invokes the conductor
Delete src/orchestration/conductor.js
Audit all require() / import paths referencing heady-conductor.js across the codebase
Update each callsite to reference heady-conductor-v2.js
Verify API surface compatibility — confirm constructor signatures and exported methods match
Run unit tests for the conductor module
Run integration tests for any orchestration flow that invokes the conductor
Delete src/orchestration/heady-conductor.js
Audit all require() / import paths referencing hc-full-pipeline.js across the codebase
Update each callsite to reference src/pipeline/pipeline-core.js
Map any pipeline configuration options used at callsites to pipeline-core.js equivalents
Verify pipeline stage ordering is preserved in pipeline-core.js
Run pipeline integration tests end-to-end
Delete src/orchestration/hc-full-pipeline.js
Audit all require() / import paths referencing hc-full-pipeline-v2.js across the codebase
Update each callsite to reference src/pipeline/pipeline-core.js
Diff hc-full-pipeline-v2.js against pipeline-core.js — port any v2-only features that are missing from pipeline-core.js before deleting
Verify pipeline stage ordering is preserved in pipeline-core.js
Run pipeline integration tests end-to-end
Delete src/orchestration/hc-full-pipeline-v2.js
Audit all require() / import paths referencing hc_pipeline.js across the codebase
Update each callsite to reference src/pipeline/pipeline-core.js
Verify API surface compatibility — note the underscore-style naming may indicate an older internal module
Run pipeline integration tests end-to-end
Delete src/orchestration/hc_pipeline.js
Audit all require() / import paths referencing src/orchestration/bee-factory.js
Update each callsite to reference bee-factory-v2.js
Verify v2 API surface — confirm createBee(), registerBee(), and any factory methods match
Run bee factory unit tests
Run orchestration integration tests
Delete src/orchestration/bee-factory.js
Audit all require() / import paths referencing src/bees/bee-factory.js
Update each callsite to reference src/orchestration/bee-factory-v2.js
Verify that the src/bees/ copy is a pure projection with no unique logic — if unique logic exists, port it to bee-factory-v2.js first
Run bee factory unit tests
Run any tests inside src/bees/ that depend on this file
Delete src/bees/bee-factory.js
Audit all require() / import paths referencing swarm-consensus.js
Update each callsite to reference swarm-consensus-v2.js
Verify consensus algorithm compatibility — confirm voting thresholds and quorum logic are equivalent or improved in v2
Run swarm consensus unit tests
Run swarm integration tests
Delete src/orchestration/swarm-consensus.js
Audit all require() / import paths referencing circuit-breaker.js
Update each callsite to reference circuit-breaker-v2.js
Verify state machine compatibility — confirm CLOSED/OPEN/HALF-OPEN states and thresholds behave identically or are improved in v2
Run circuit breaker unit tests
Run resilience integration tests
Delete src/orchestration/circuit-breaker.js
Audit all require() / import paths referencing rate-limiter.js
Update each callsite to reference rate-limiter-hardened.js
Verify rate limit configuration compatibility — confirm window sizes, request caps, and backoff strategies are preserved or improved
Run rate limiter unit tests
Run API-layer integration tests that rely on rate limiting
Delete src/orchestration/rate-limiter.js
Audit all require() / import paths referencing rate-limiter-v2.js
Update each callsite to reference rate-limiter-hardened.js
Diff rate-limiter-v2.js against rate-limiter-hardened.js — confirm all v2 improvements are present in the hardened variant; port any missing capabilities
Run rate limiter unit tests
Run API-layer integration tests that rely on rate limiting
Delete src/orchestration/rate-limiter-v2.js
